metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Web Serial API. Connect to serial devices, send/receive data, and explore serial communication in the browser.
Interactive playground for the Web Share API — share text, URLs, titles, and files using the native sharing UI. Includes file sharing, platform detection, and fallback strategies.

jtc_step_1_user_cancelled_nat.en: Step 1: User cancelled native share. Falling through...

jtc_step_4_showing_prompt_for.en: Step 4: Showing prompt for manual copy.

title_web_share_target_playgrou.en: Web Share Target Playground — Dev Vault

metadesc_interactive_web_share_tar.en: Interactive Web Share Target API playground. Build share_target manifest configurations, explore POST/GET methods, file handling, and service worker code generation.

footer_web_share_target_playgrou.en: Web Share Target Playground — Dev Vault

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for Web Speech API — SpeechRecognition and SpeechSynthesis in one page.

label_text_will_be_spoken_as_is.en: Text (will be spoken as-is in each language)

jtc_speechrecognition_is_not.en: SpeechRecognition is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge.

jtc_speechrecognition_not_sup.en: SpeechRecognition not supported. Use Chrome or Edge.

title_web_speech_api_playground.en: Web Speech API Playground — Dev Vault

metadesc_interactive_web_speech_ap.en: Interactive Web Speech API playground. Text-to-speech synthesis and speech recognition in one tool. All voice parameters, real-time transcription, code export.

placeholder_type_or_paste_text_to_spe.en: Type or paste text to speak...

footer_web_speech_api_playground.en: Web Speech API Playground — Dev Vault

jtc_speechrecognition_not_sup.en: SpeechRecognition not supported in this browser

metadesc_interactive_web_storage_q.en: Interactive web storage quota visualizer. Test localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB limits. See usage in real-time, simulate quota errors, learn storage strategies.

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the WebTransport API. Explore HTTP/3 QUIC connections, datagrams, streams, and compare with WebSocket.
Interactive playground for the Web USB API - request devices, explore interfaces and endpoints, build transfer demos, and view device descriptors.

subtitle_use_navigator_usb_request.en: Use navigator.usb.requestDevice() with optional filters to select a USB device.

subtitle_view_device_configuration.en: View device configurations, interfaces, alternate settings, and endpoints.

subtitle_perform_control_bulk_and.en: Perform Control, Bulk, and Interrupt transfers. Requires an open device with claimed interfaces.

subtitle_hex_dump_viewer_for_usb_t.en: Hex dump viewer for USB transfer data. Data from transfers appears here automatically.

subtitle_reference_for_usb_device.en: Reference for USB device class codes used in filters and interface descriptors.

subtitle_complete_web_usb_integrat.en: Complete Web USB integration code based on your configuration.

label_paste_hex_data_or_type_to.en: Paste hex data or type to preview

jtc_connect_usb_devices_from.en: Connect USB devices from your browser. Requires HTTPS or localhost.

jtc_web_usb_api_is_not_suppor.en: Web USB API is not supported

jtc_this_api_requires_chrome.en: This API requires Chrome/Edge 61+ with HTTPS. Firefox and Safari do not support it.

metadesc_calculate_performance_bud.en: Calculate performance budgets for Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS). Allocate resource budgets, estimate third-party costs, and export Lighthouse CI configs.

h3_transfer_size_impact_on_l.en: Transfer Size Impact on Load Time

metadesc_interactive_playground_to.en: Interactive playground to trigger, measure, and understand LCP, INP, and CLS in real-time using PerformanceObserver.

jtc_this_is_a_large_text_bloc.en: This is a large text block that could become the LCP element if it is the largest visible content.

jtc_large_injected_element_12.en: Large injected element (120px, no reserved space)

jtc_injected_with_reserved_sp.en: Injected with reserved space (min-height + contain: layout) - no CLS!

jtc_text_rendered_with_fallba.en: Text rendered with fallback font (monospace, narrower)

jtc_font_loaded_wider_glyphs.en: Font loaded! Wider glyphs cause layout shift above and below.

metadesc_interactive_demos_of_web.en: Interactive demos of Web Worker patterns: computation offloading, message passing, worker pools, and SharedWorker concepts.

subtitle_interactive_demos_with_re.en: Interactive demos with real Worker execution via Blob URLs

subtitle_run_expensive_calculation.en: Run expensive calculations on the main thread vs. a Web Worker. Watch the spinner — if it freezes, the main thread is blocked. Workers keep the UI responsive.

subtitle_instead_of_creating_and_d.en: Instead of creating and destroying workers for each task, maintain a pool of reusable workers. Tasks are queued and dispatched to idle workers. This reduces creation overhead and limits resource usage.

subtitle_sharedworkers_are_shared.en: SharedWorkers are shared across all tabs/windows of the same origin. They're useful for shared state, broadcast communication, and resource deduplication. Note: SharedWorker support varies (not available in all browsers).

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for Web Workers message passing patterns. Dedicated Worker, SharedWorker, Transferable Objects, Structured Clone cost, Worker Pool.
Interactive playground for the WebCodecs API - encode, decode, and process video/audio frames in the browser.

jtc_try_chrome_94_or_edge_94.en: Try Chrome 94+ or Edge 94+. All demos will run in simulation mode.

metadesc_interactive_webrtc_connec.en: Interactive WebRTC connection flow visualizer. SDP Offer/Answer, ICE candidates, STUN/TURN servers, Trickle ICE, connection states. Step-through signaling sequence diagrams.

title_websocket_frame_inspector.en: WebSocket Frame Inspector — RFC 6455 Frame Decoder

metadesc_interactive_websocket_fra.en: Interactive WebSocket frame decoder and generator. Parse hex to see FIN, opcode, mask, payload. Generate frames for testing. Visualize RFC 6455 wire format.

subtitle_decode_and_generate_rfc_6.en: Decode and generate RFC 6455 WebSocket frames

metadesc_generate_a_qr_code_for_sh.en: Generate a QR code for sharing WiFi network credentials. Supports WPA/WPA2, WEP, no password, and WPA2-EAP.

subtitle_generate_a_qr_code_for_sh.en: Generate a QR code for sharing WiFi credentials

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Window Controls Overlay API - build custom titlebars, explore CSS env() variables, and configure PWA display_override.

jtc_window_controls_overlay_a.en: Window Controls Overlay API is supported!

jtc_window_controls_overlay_a_2.en: Window Controls Overlay API is not available

jtc_the_visual_demos_still_wo.en: The visual demos still work. Install as a PWA in Chrome 105+ to use the real API.

title_word_count_text_analyzer.en: Word Count — Text Analyzer for Writers

metadesc_count_words_characters_se.en: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs. Reading time, readability score, keyword density. Free, instant, no signup.

subtitle_paste_your_text_get_insta.en: Paste your text. Get instant analysis — words, readability, keywords.

placeholder_start_typing_or_paste_you.en: Start typing or paste your text here...

metadesc_browser_based_rich_text_w.en: Browser-based rich text WYSIWYG editor. Bold, italic, underline, lists, headings, links, images, and more. Paste content and export as HTML or Markdown.

subtitle_rich_text_editor_with_htm.en: Rich text editor with HTML and Markdown export

metadesc_generate_self_signed_x_50.en: Generate self-signed X.509 SSL/TLS certificates with RSA-2048 key pair. Free browser tool using Web Crypto API.

subtitle_generate_self_signed_ssl.en: Generate self-signed SSL/TLS certificates locally in your browser.

title_xml_formatter_validator_f.en: XML Formatter & Validator — Format, Minify, Convert XML

metadesc_format_validate_and_minif.en: Format, validate, and minify XML. Convert to JSON. XPath queries. Syntax highlighting. No upload required.

subtitle_format_minify_validate_an.en: Format, minify, validate, and convert XML. XPath queries. No upload required.

metadesc_convert_xml_data_to_json.en: Convert XML data to JSON format and back. Supports attributes, nested elements, arrays, and CDATA sections.

subtitle_convert_between_xml_and_j.en: Convert between XML and JSON formats

metadesc_convert_yaml_to_json_and.en: Convert YAML to JSON and JSON to YAML. Validate, format, minify. Handles nested objects, arrays, anchors. Free, no upload.

subtitle_convert_between_yaml_and.en: Convert between YAML and JSON. No upload, no server.

metadesc_convert_yaml_data_to_toml.en: Convert YAML data to TOML format and back. Supports nested objects, arrays, booleans, numbers, and strings.

subtitle_convert_between_yaml_and.en: Convert between YAML and TOML formats

metadesc_view_and_explore_yaml_fil.en: View and explore YAML files with collapsible tree view, syntax highlighting, and search. Parse and validate YAML content.

subtitle_parse_view_and_explore_ya.en: Parse, view, and explore YAML content with tree visualization
